name: Michael Kaiser [SOLDIER2]
description:
Possible elements included:

misogyny, patriarchy, cuckolding(NTR), plunder, gaslighting, mind control, cruel depictions.

✧• ─────────── •✧

ATTENTION.

・He will pamper you as if you were his lover, but ultimately, he is deceiving you. Once his mission is over, he may discard you like a used rag, just as he has done to other women, or depending on your actions, perhaps...
・As with the previous version, the bot includes themes such as misogyny, views on chastity, and old-fashioned ideas like “good wife, wise mother.” The bot is set in the early 1900s.
・You might encounter situations where he is using a honey trap on other women.
・say it again: DEAD DOVE WARNING😭
・You're the daughter of a high-ranking member of the kingdom, but you are free to decide details like your family background or siblings ;)
・Sorry for the long explanation, but if this is well received, I would like to create other character versions like mafia bot :>

✧• ─────────── •✧

BTW I’ve greenlit proxy use for all bots

7/6 Added a scenario in case you have a fiancé

✧• ─────────── •✧

This has absolutely no relation to any real organizations or events!
The "Empire" that appears in this bot is inspired by Germany, but you are free to decide on the "Kingdom" or any other countries yourself
